data.title: Small Business Trends (2026): Registered Agents Inc Highlights State-by-State Formation Data by Expert Consumers
data.description: In the latest report released on March 13, 2026, by Expert Consumers, an analysis of small business trends in the United States has been conducted. The review focuses on the performance of Registered Agents Inc, particularly noting its comprehensive state-by-state business formation data and innovative monthly reporting approach. This highlights the company's effectiveness in providing valuable insights into small business operations throughout the country.

data.title: Former JP Morgan and Dresdner Kleinwort Traders Launch Crypto Prop Firm After Paying Out USD2.5 Billion in Fintech
data.description: Velotrade, a company established by ex-institutional derivatives traders from major financial institutions like JP Morgan and Dresdner, has ventured into the crypto-funded trading sector. Their entry into this market in Hong Kong on March 13, 2026, signals a strategic move towards leveraging institutional expertise in finance with a focus on the cryptocurrency realm. The platform is designed with a fresh rule set for crypto traders, aiming to provide a robust foundation for their operations. This development marks a significant shift in the industry landscape, introducing new opportunities and expertise.

data.title: Klarna Board Chair Michael Moritz Acquires 3.47 Million Shares for $50 Million
data.description: In recent disclosures, Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR) unveiled transactions by its Chair of the Board of Directors and Chief Product & Design Officer as per the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on Form 3. Specifically, Michael Moritz, the Chairman, acquired 3,472,845 ordinary shares during March 3 to March 11, 2026, totaling $49,913,138.73 through an associated entity. Furthermore, David Fock, the Chief Product & Design Officer, also made a purchase, yet the specific details were not provided in the summary.

data.description: In Singapore, Block Blast! remains a top choice for mobile gamers globally, with a significant number of players consistently engaging with the free game.

data.title: Frore Systems Introduces LiquidJet™ Nexus - Defining the AI Thermal Stack for Next-Generation ½ U AI Server Systems like NVIDIA Kyber
data.description: Today in SAN JOSE, California, Frore Systems introduced LiquidJet™ Nexus, an advanced liquid cooling system on March 13, 2026. This cutting-edge technology is created to enhance AI performance by addressing thermal barriers. With the rising AI compute densities, heat management has become crucial for optimized performance.

data.title: From R&D Self-Reliance to Standard Reshaping: How Chinese Brand BABI Decodes Global Photoprotection Challenges and Reconstructs Sunscreen Logic with Patented Technology
data.description: In Hangzhou, China on March 13, 2026, it was reported that advancements in sun protection have been linked to efforts to combat skin photoaging over the years. Despite the general knowledge about the importance of sun protection, market data indicates a concerning trend of inadequate suncare practices.

data.title: SmartStop Self Storage Named a Top Climate-Controlled Storage Provider by Newsweek Readers’ Choice; Highest-Ranked Public Company on 2026 List
data.description: In Ladera Ranch, California, SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. (NYSE: SMA) has been acknowledged as one of the leading climate-controlled storage providers in the United States and Canada. Newsweek readers voted SmartStop as a top choice in the 2026 Readers’ Choice rankings. SmartStop, known for owning and operating premier self-storage facilities, ranked the highest among companies listed in this category. This recognition showcases SmartStop’s commitment to excellence in providing quality storage solutions.

data.title: Alimentaria+Hostelco 2026 reinforces its leadership in a historic edition
data.description: From March 23 to 26, 2026, Alimentaria+Hostelco is making a comeback at Fira de Barcelona's Gran Via venue in Barcelona, Spain. This event solidifies its role as a key platform for the food, hospitality, and foodservice industries. With the upcoming edition being significant for Alimentaria, the event is set to showcase the latest trends and innovations in these sectors.

data.title: Mahoney Environmental Announces Retirement of Tim Zak and Promotion of Beau Mega
data.description: Woodridge, Illinois - On March 13, 2026, Mahoney Environmental revealed that Tim Zak, their SVP of Sales and Marketing, will retire on April 6, 2026, following 12 years of exceptional service. Taking over his position will be Beau Mega, who has been elevated from his previous role as VP of National.

data.title: 2025 ezW2Correction Software Approved by SSA with New PDF Recipient Delivery Feature
data.description: Starting in 2025, Halfpricesoft.com's ezW2Correction software has received approval from the Social Security Administration (SSA) to make W-2C and W-3C corrections easier. The software securely sends recipient forms in a convenient PDF format. The announcement was made from REDMOND, Wash. on March 13, 2026, highlighting the increased efficiency and security features of the updated software.

data.title: KuCoin Launches Stock Index Perpetual Contracts, Expanding 24/7 Cross-Asset Access
data.description: In Providenciales, located in the Turks and Caicos Islands, today on March 13, 2026, KuCoin, a prominent worldwide cryptocurrency platform known for its reliability, disclosed the introduction of its Stock Index Perpetual Contracts. The initial set of contracts, which encompasses the Tesla Index Perpetual among others, is set to be listed. This move is aimed at diversifying the investment options available on the platform and attracting more traders interested in stock index trading.
